system_rules.response_time: All API responses must return within 30 seconds
system_rules.data_privacy: All PII data must be encrypted at rest and in transit
system_rules.authentication: JWT-based authentication required for all protected endpoints
system_rules.rate_limiting: Max 100 requests per minute per user
system_rules.audit_logging: All critical operations must be logged with timestamps

ai_orchestration_rules.context_window: Maintain last 10 conversation turns for context
